No new material events were provided in the refresh bundle, so the MSFT thesis state remains unchanged aside from the routine review timestamp update. Confidence, assumptions, and action rules are preserved.

valuation_regime.current_yardstick: Mature cloud P/E plus AI premium
valuation_regime.re_rating_logic: The market pays again for AI distribution and pricing power instead of just infrastructure spend.
valuation_regime.associated_risk: If monetization lags, the premium disappears faster than fundamentals deteriorate.
valuation_regime.switch_trigger: Copilot monetization shows real seat growth and CapEx intensity stabilizes.
valuation_regime.better_yardstick: AI platform and enterprise distribution premium

thesis.core_catalyst: Copilot adoption、M365 pricing pass-through、Azure AI demand.
thesis.market_blind_spot: 市場短線聚焦高 CapEx，低估 model-agnostic Copilot 與商業訂價權恢復帶來的 EPS 扭轉。
thesis.statement: 微軟仍是 AI 基礎設施與企業分發的核心受益者，但要讓股價脫離 CapEx 懷疑，必須用 Copilot adoption、M365 漲價與 Azure AI 需求證明其估值可以重新從成熟雲端股回到高品質 AI 平台股。
thesis.expiry_condition: Azure growth falls below 30%, Copilot adoption remains stalled, or flagship government cloud access materially weakens.

seed_events.title: Q2 FY2026 Azure stayed strong but CapEx nearly reached $30B.
Copilot enterprise penetration remained near 3%, below expectations.

assumptions.invalidation_condition: Azure growth drops below 30% or AI contribution decelerates materially.
assumptions.statement: Azure AI demand can keep total Azure growth above 30%.
assumptions.verification_method: Quarterly Azure growth and AI contribution disclosures.

assumptions.invalidation_condition: Copilot stays below 10% enterprise penetration through the next earnings cycle.
assumptions.statement: Copilot adoption can improve enough to justify the AI distribution premium.
assumptions.verification_method: Enterprise adoption commentary, seat growth, and attach rates.

assumptions.invalidation_condition: CapEx keeps accelerating while margin and monetization do not improve for two quarters.
assumptions.statement: CapEx growth will translate into durable revenue and margin support rather than pure cost drag.
assumptions.verification_method: CapEx trend, gross margin trend, and monetization updates.

research_topic: AI monetization reset and model-agnostic platform hedge
